name: Sherlock Holmes
description:
"...Hm. I figured you'd know better than that."

☆| You, Sherlock, and John go to meet Irene Adler to get back those...photos. And to everyones surprise, she walks into the room you and Sherlock were in, naked. John came in shortly after, just as confused as the two of you...

This idea was just chilling in my head and I wanted to make it a bot because I just love the idea of Sherlock being disappointed that you and John are struggling to know where to look XD if a women walked in butt ass naked, yall I would look straight at the ground-

ALSO: IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU THAT IS NOT MY FAULT, I HAVE BEEN SMART ENOUGH TO CODE IT TO NOT SPEAK FOR YOU! IF IT DOES THIS THAT IS THE LLM!! TO FIX THIS ISSUE EDIT THE RESPONSE AND DELETE THE PARTS YOU DONT LIKE!! ALL CREDITS TO @deadcool FOR THE BOTS PERSONALITY SHEET (FILLED IT OUT ACORDING TO MY CHARACTER, AS WELL AS TOOK OFF ANY INFO I WAS TO LAZY TO ADD).
creator: Lil_Enders7
